name: Name
certificate_fail: Cannot generate certificate now (you need at least 10000 coins)
wrong_role: You are trying to log in with the wrong type (Student/Partner).
server_connection_problem: Server connection issue. Make sure Apache (XAMPP) is running.
hero_text:
A smart AI-powered platform that helps students transform their learning, skills, and real achievements into measurable value.
QOYN connects academic data, courses, projects, and experiences into one personalized journey — guiding students from university to real career opportunities.

Through intelligent skill analysis and a value-based reward system, every effort you make is recognized, measured, and rewarded.
about_title: A Smarter Journey from Learning to Opportunity with QOYN
phase_1_text: Build in-demand skills through practical, AI-evaluated courses. Earn QOYN Coins based on the quality and impact of what you learn.
phase_2_text: Apply your skills to real-world projects and simulations. Get evaluated by AI and earn more value through hands-on experience.
phase_3_text: Work in AI-matched teams and access real projects, internships, and jobs. Turn your skills into verified career opportunities before graduation.
course_ai_desc: Learn how intelligent systems work, from machine learning models to real AI applications.
step_1_text: Create your QOYN account and set up your student profile. The platform begins analyzing your academic background, skills, and goals to guide your journey from day one.
footer_bottom_text: QOYN is a skill-based learning and career platform powered by AI. © 2026 QOYN.
step_2_text:
Purchase courses within your chosen learning path, complete
practical tasks, and take skill-based assessments.
Every achievement is evaluated by AI,
and you earn QOYN Coins based
on quality and progress.
step_3_text:
Once you earn 10,000 QOYN Coins,
you unlock access to individual
real-world projects. These projects
help you apply your skills
independently and build verified
experience before graduation.
step_4_text:
At 20,000 QOYN Coins, you enter
the next level: large-scale
collaborative projects. QOYN
matches you with multidisciplinary
teams to solve real company
challenges and access career-
level opportunities.
how_bottom_title: Your Future Built Step by Step
how_bottom_text:
With QOYN, learning is no longer just about completing courses — it’s
about creating real value. Every task you finish, every coin you earn, and
every project you unlock brings you closer to real-world experience and
career opportunities. QOYN connects your skills, your progress, and your
future in one intelligent journey. Simple as that.
footer_desc: QOYN is an AI-powered platform that transforms learning into measurable value. We guide students through structured skill paths, reward achievements with Coins, and connect them to real projects and career opportunities before graduation.

welcome_text:
QOYN helps you build measurable skills through courses, tasks, and practical projects.
Earn Coins for every achievement and track your growth with AI-powered evaluation.
Join real-world challenges, collaborate with teams, and gain career-ready experience.
Start today — your skills are your value, and your future begins here
need_help: if you need any help ask
course_desc_placeholder: Write what you would like to work on
choose_suggested_path_desc: Choose the path that suits you, and we will build a learning path for it.
no_suggested_roles: We couldn't find suggested roles. Try writing a clearer course description.
major_updated_and_materials_prepared: Major updated and materials prepared successfully
major_saved_no_matching_plan: Major saved, but no matching plan was found
write_course_title_and_description_first: Write the course title and description first.
choose_role_from_suggestions: Choose a role from the suggestions below.
new_videos_for_plan: New videos for courses in your plan
hover_card_note: Click the card to open the first course. Hover over the card to show more related courses.
each_instructor_has_playlist: Each instructor has their own playlist, and inside it are their videos.
posted_new_video_for_course: posted a new video related to course:
finding_best_courses: Finding the best courses for this subject...
failed_api_connection: Failed to connect to the API
failed_loading_courses_login: Failed to load courses (make sure you are logged in)
no_required_courses_saved: No required courses saved. Go back, upload the plan, and press analyze.
error_loading_courses: An error occurred while loading courses.
profile_hint: Shows AI + Company + Final + Coins for each project
company_review_note: Note: If the Company Review has not happened yet, Company/Final will appear empty.
no_phase2_submissions: You do not have any Phase 2 submissions yet.
phase3_results_description: Here you can see all your submissions and results with company evaluation.
chat_hint: If a company sends you a message it will appear here
phase2_intro_text: During this phase, you will focus on completing your individual project. Successfully finish your tasks and collect 20,000 coins to unlock the next stage and join the major project.
milestones_note: Each milestone has a clear deliverable + an acceptance checklist.
repo_link_optional: GitHub/GitLab Link (optional if you uploaded a ZIP)
upload_zip_optional: Upload ZIP (optional if you provided a repo)
notes_demo_run: Notes + Demo Video Link + Run Instructions
notes_placeholder: How do I run the project? Demo link? Any notes?
submit_note: Note: You must upload a ZIP file or provide a repository link.
api_fetch_failed: Failed to connect to API. Check API_BASE or the server.
api_non_json: The API returned a non-JSON response.
sent_to_company_waiting: Project sent to company and waiting for review.
last_submit_passed_no_coins: Last submission passed, but no coins were added.
last_submit_not_successful: Last submission was not successful, so no coins were awarded.
must_upload_zip_or_repo: You must upload a ZIP or provide a repo link.
sent_project_to_company: Project sent to the company for review.
passed_no_extra_coins: Your result passed, but no extra coins were added because you had already reached
coins_only_on_pass: Coins are only awarded on PASS.
phase3_intro_text: Congratulations! By collecting 20,000 coins, you've proven your abilities and unlocked Phase Three. Now it's time to step into the big project, collaborate with others, and turn your knowledge into real impact.
phase3_tasks_intro: Here you can see the company name, the big project, and your partial task. Submit ZIP or Repo and write your note if you want.
status_waiting_company_review: Submitted and waiting for company review
status_selected: You were selected in the project
zip_note: Preferably ZIP contains your part files + small README.
click_company_show_playlists: Click a company to view playlists and then videos
open_company_toggle_paths: Open a company, then enable or disable the paths you want for it
confirm_delete_path: Are you sure you want to delete path
no_ai_recommendations: No recommendations found. Check templates and mapping
failed_create_path_check_console: Failed to create path, check Console
subject: Subject
comment_optional: Comment / note for reviewer or company (optional)
phase3_hero_desc: Congratulations! By collecting 20,000 coins, you've proven your abilities and unlocked Phase Three. Now it's time to step into the big project, collaborate with others, and turn your knowledge into real impact.
phase3_hero_title: Phase3 Unlocked! Time for the Big Project
phase3_status_selected: You have been selected in the project
phase3_status_waiting_review: Submitted and waiting for company review
phase3_zip_note: Preferably a ZIP containing your part files + a small README.
phase3_results_subtitle: View your interview simulations, scores, verdicts, and feedback
job_sim_hero_desc: Upload your CV, add your GitHub or project link, choose your target role, and get a more premium, visual, and exciting readiness experience that feels like a real modern AI product.
job_sim_stat_cv: Smart review for role-match and skill relevance
job_sim_stat_github: Checks your portfolio presence and project quality
job_sim_stat_ai: Gives you a cleaner, faster job-readiness impression
job_sim_side_desc: The simulator reviews your selected role, your uploaded CV, and your public project link, then prepares your job-readiness analysis and sends you toward your report flow.
job_sim_box1_desc: Cleaner layout, stronger visual hierarchy, and a more polished AI product feel.
job_sim_box2_desc: Your simulator now looks more like a premium dashboard, not just a plain upload form.
job_sim_box3_desc: Added a clear return button so the user can jump back to the main page instantly.
job_sim_form_desc: Fill in the fields below and launch your AI job simulation. The design now feels more premium, more visual, and much closer to a modern startup dashboard.
job_sim_github_hint: Add your public GitHub repository or project link
job_sim_feature1_desc: Stronger gradients, cards, shapes, and illustration blocks make the simulator feel like a real AI platform instead of a plain form.
job_sim_feature2_desc: The page now explains itself visually through stats, side highlights, and a custom inline SVG illustration without needing external images.
job_sim_feature3_desc: All your JavaScript IDs stay the same, so the logic keeps working while the whole page becomes much more impressive.
job_sim_tips_title: How to look stronger in the simulation
job_sim_tips_desc: Small changes in your submission can make your profile look much better. Keep your CV clean, your GitHub public, and your target role aligned with the skills you actually show.
job_sim_tip1: Use a CV that clearly shows tools, projects, and measurable outcomes.
job_sim_tip2: Add a public GitHub repo with a solid README and visible commits.
job_sim_tip3: Pick a target role that actually matches your strongest technical skills.
chat_input_hint: Press Enter to send · Shift + Enter for new line
courses_subtitle: Explore curated tracks to boost your skills and advance your career
more_coming_soon_text: We're adding more high-quality courses to help you grow.
watch_video_subtitle: Watch the video, continue the playlist, and answer the questions.
